Would 1000% recommend","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna Chiara","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDXjEyPC_gvCFp_iNkZeF8bzl3jbFiRgMg058C-VGha4KL3n1jGw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"In November 2024 I contacted Lambton Developments to replace a skylight and section of roof. We are very satisfied with the work quality, integrity and of this company. The price was very competitive and John and Rielly were a pleasure to do business with. I recommend them and will surely use them again in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carrie Schenkel-zuber","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL2MsRjJSR_LzI6P7r1zpJFx2NcdAPhejohhuw7pyxKYaqr3g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This company isn't even worth a 1 star.
I would not recommend this company to do your roof.  We asked John if he could do our roof November 2023 because it was leaking and needed to be replaced asap. He said yes and it could be done within a week or two. We gave John the 50% deposit right away assuming he would complete the roof within a week or two at the latest.  Fast forward almost a year later and still no roof completed. We followed up with John several times to complete the roof or give us our deposit back so we could book another roofing company to do the work and all we received were excuses why he couldn't do the roof, raining, wind, other jobs, etc.  Meanwhile we never heard from him when the weather was beautiful outside and it could have been done in 1-2 days.  Every time it rained out the roof would leak and was starting to get worse with every rain fall. We sent him pictures of the roof leaking and causing damage in our upper unit and asked several times for this to be a priority. Keep in mind we already gave him the deposit and he kept bumping our job for other jobs, saying ours was going to be next.. it will get done. Why was our roof not being done? we don't know. And he refused to give us our deposit back. In August we finally had some hopeful news that the roof was being started. We asked our tenants if anyone had been there or any work completed only to find out that he put a tarp on our roof. This was his "repair" job.
In September 2024 we had enough of his excuses for not completing the roof and had no other choice but to fire him. Winter is coming soon and this roof needs to be replaced asap.
We have yet to receive our deposit back as well. This will be next battle we are currently facing and since he is not co-operating we will now need to seek legal advice and action through the courts to get our funds back. It isn't right for him to take advantage and steal our money. A contract was signed and he didn't hold up his end of the contract.
This is extremely disappointing and can't believe this is how he has treated us. We hope this never happens to anyone else that chooses to use his services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Spencer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0mBnrqeMWlEkBuKa64_wrGJFmfI4WboYjbsrcBi2l69L94Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We would recommend John and his team for all roofing and construction needs. Right from the start, John and the team were honest,dependable and knowledgeable. They became instrumental in the design and rebuild of our roof. The quality and integrity of this company is first rate. We just love the new look to our house.
Thankyou John and all,
You are the best
Paul &Laura Spencer","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Dawe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNTRhTvomtnCyIHDRvqdLj-_WO1b9VrmVb9S5dO4ZrQP9buw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"John and his crew just completed work for us, on time and on budget. Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dorian Latawiec","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVueSVpmEhp7VhbKXGho_VCG9kBA2ix7oCLYUR_RUOyUFao7HuOfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have used Lambton Developments for years at different houses, John is always dependable, reliable and honest. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Georgia Gander","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJHDUrsFT7-qzwEadnhomViSwpY5quhc3e8kDI2t5FnsyLKg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I am writing this review with the hope of saving someone the frustration that I have just experienced when using Bens Roofing in Sarnia, Ontario.  I can’t comment on whether the positive reviews here are fake or not, however my experience mirrors that of Ms Morningstar as outlined in her review.  My ‘two week’ contract for roof and siding replacement on a small cottage was still NOT complete after 6 weeks.

The employees were polite and managed doing the roof but had to redo areas which were done incorrectly.  Eg the ridge cap and chimney flashing.  However, these employees did NOT know how to do siding, soffit and facia, flashing or trim and it certainly showed it!

Even though the weather had some rainy and windy days, this two week job just kept on and on and on!  Their ability to work with the “J-channel” around the windows was ridiculous and resulted in them coming back numerous times to fix things - only to have it look just as bad as the first time.  Some of the caulking that was done looked like a 3 year old’s colouring and even some of the actual siding was not level or installed incorrectly and in one area was buckled.

The workers often arrived late in the morning and finished their day mid afternoon, leaving dropped nails, bits of vinyl siding, tortured aluminum and hundreds of cigarette butts for us to clean up, which was frustrating since they knew my time constraints.

After 6 weeks and overdue on my deadline, I finally chose to ask them to leave.  I am now having to buy product and have my husband spend his time and effort in trying to correct this terribly unprofessional job.

The long and the short of it?  LONG on promises - SHORT on performance!   LONG on excuses - SHORT on quality!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOOL_PaGtq3NHw&fid=0x0:0x721fd2fb53bf8543"],"When":"2025-5-30"},{"Name":"John Cowan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIRT7nFamX_5aHlLVbkZCtbAtwAmtf4M06WqtGkonczaD_L9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jason and his team did a great job replacing a very complicated roof on our house. We would be pleased to recommend Ben's to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ade ogunlade","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4GZvVx02wFYi6mQ-wAQkW1_OZD4p2eP1m0RbSfznvkRO8ug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ben’s roofing gets the job done. Am a satisfied customer since 2017.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary McHenry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLSzgWBekr4HptjDSuZjZfMz2ZA7ywq5MJ1PQLtZSSIHZPn6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jason is a new owner, and we were very impressed and thankful for his quick response. It was a pleasure to deal with Jason and his crew.  Thank you Jason!
Gerry and Mary McHenry","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Doug Deeper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIygJn0D_Cm-bjHCzDhK39Jw02BlMzl26-ihzxkYgdFsGAt8A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"In a business that is widely known as bieng shady, BENS Roofing is the worst and most shady company I've ever seen/heard of.

It took over a month to do an extremely simple job.....
The first week there were three people sitting in the truck smoking while one laborer did most the work (if they even showed up that day)....
They that's all their tools and equipment all over the place and never bothered to clean up daily.

The lady in the office was even worse to deal with then the actual roofers.

Now its been two years and the roof looks awful and we still get nails on the driveway every time it rains becuase they didnt even properly at the end of the job.. ive had one flat tire my entire life up until the roof was done.. now I've had multiple, so has my wife. .. and its a rusty roofing nail every single time we look. Always by the downspout.

Just find ANYONE else. Do yourself a favour.... you're just going to be disappointed if you hire these scammers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"sandra parker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQ4k7TO5JMmhne3xPuQ-ls693ItLh6EJmfiNb7WRByF2iBKmHm=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Ben’s roofing. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Emma Leask","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlHKRF0NwvlcZy9-TPsNTHLRz3KeyszezohtaCsp7RXYVglyWwoA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I rarely leave negative reviews, but my experience with this roofing company was extremely frustrating from start to finish. When they gave me the initial estimate, they told me the project would begin within 3–6 weeks. Instead, they didn’t even start the job until 8 weeks after the estimate.

Throughout that entire period, communication was terrible. I would call, text, and message the company repeatedly just trying to get an update, and most of the time I wouldn’t hear anything back. It felt like once they had my deposit, I was completely ignored.

When the job was finally done, they didn’t even notify me. I only found out because I called them myself to ask if the work had been completed, and they casually told me it was.

To make things worse, their cleanup was awful. They left my yard covered in shingles, nails, and other debris, and I had to clean up a lot of it myself just to make the area safe.

The most alarming part of the whole experience was when they somehow lit a propane tank on fire during the job and then placed it in my ditch. That level of carelessness made me question their basic safety practices and professionalism.

Based on my experience, I absolutely cannot recommend this company. The delays, the lack of communication, the poor cleanup, and the unsafe behavior were completely unacceptable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAONx9nLJMeuc8V31odVh6U&fid=0x0:0xa646cf0891b1acb2"],"When":"2025-11-23"},{"Name":"Nick Anthony","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpWSmnMXKdN4c0R22OYvwMTKqk6xRAsdUBVVasxGZ33V8fCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend First Response Roofing.  I had a new roof installed and it looks great.  The installers were very professional and did an excellent job and thorough clean up when the job was completed.  Communication was excellent from the time I contacted them and throughout the whole process.  They answered all my questions and concerns and made the whole process very easy for me, also at a very good price.  You honestly can't go wrong hiring First Response and I will definitely use them again next time I need any improvements to my home.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joanne Page","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJpRHLABsWHTP6bdjQK7kOb8ExJ44cgs9V0147jjlTeb5R9Rg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our experience with First Response Roofing and Construction was great. Mario, our Company Rep. was professional and easy to work with. Every question I had after our initial meeting Mario got back with me promptly. We described what we wanted for our home and attached garage. It would not be a simple siding job. We needed new underlayment throughout and some window frames had to be stripped and have new woodwork added (with our approval) because of rot and termite damage. This experienced crew handled this job with careful thought and expertise. We could not have asked for better workmanship. We, also, needed new gutters which First Response had a gutter company come in and install them. After the job was complete they cleaned up the area thoroughly. They even put items back in place that needed to be moved. If you need to wait a few more weeks for your project to start... it's well worth it! We would highly recommend this company for your home project.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stephen McCalmon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKF42ytDp4oIAaZ7YH_v0dGYaA5VG8QeBqqSFqVzVsgk8muxA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First Response Roofing did an absolutely amazing job on our roof replacement this past fall.  From start to finish, their work and cleanup was impeccable.  Their communication was prompt and clear throughout the complete process.  We can’t imagine that the roof replacement and gutter replacement could have been completed any better.
Thanks to Dave Graham and his crew for an excellent experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mary Griswold","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3Sp-w5JjDsRWSF4ts7q7wRkIx0aKXstvBZ3Jz9Mj9X9Te2Udh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't thank First Response Roofing and Construction, LLC enough for their rapid response when my roofing shingles failed-- during the most recent cold spell with windchill below 0*.  Terry and his team replaced my roof in the worst of circumstances with great attitudes and expediency.  It took his team five days from start to finish.  If you need a quick response and quality workmanship, I wouldn't hesitate to recommend First Response Roofing and Construction, LLC.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dayne Edmondson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJE5Clbe1NvDwmSbhPc_L9YXKDfCEFr67Mw_CxtPmNMdawL-cYPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our experience with First Response was great when we replaced our 22 year old roof on a 2 story colonial.

Greg made the quoting process quick, painless and simple. Price was competitive. Timeline for completion was communicated from the start.

The crew were courteous, communicated well, cleaned up after themselves exceptionally well. Did a great job, despite a steep roof.

I highly recommend this company for roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ri Si","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKP8i8KP1mOGjAlXrh_ZKyJZypnyTCZTLfGKFCFneMco54QYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My experience was a bit delayed on this.
But I would forsure say this company is not the best in customer service. The sales rep attitude was disgusting.  But the office staff was a delight. She actually cared.
The sales rep they sent was some guy named Greg. He is a real piece of work. He treats you like a firend. Like he doing you a great big time favor with a price tag on it.
I asked them to complete a insurance job on a rental I had.
The new roof was done great. But Little things with that were annoying. But expected from a company like this. Our exhaust vent cover on the siding may have came loose at the time of the repair or shortly after on the 2nd floor on the house. I asked Greg if he could help me out to just put another cover on. As it quit dangerous for me to repair it myself .His response was.... "$595 is our minimum charge". Even for a 2 minute job..... for that I called another roofing company and they came out and put a new cover on in a matter of minutes. And then didnt even charge me. We chuckled after with them after as they said some companies don't realize the little things we can do .Can potentially help with future business. Definitely true on that point.
Now for the real disgusting review..... this company again was hired to do interior work in the kitchen of this property. The crew they brought in were very messy and didnt even clean up the mess. Drywall mud and dust everywhere. Didnt even think to clean it up . When I contacted this "so called" sale rep Greg... he didnt care about this " I believe his response was ina very rudely tone. That you need to figure something else out"
so apparently you must have a 2nd kitchen in your home so they can repair the other one. Sorry most homes don't have 2 kitchens to prepare meals for their children. He was trying to compare it to a bath room. If one is being fixed up.  Then just use the other one. I ended up complaining to the actually owners of the company. And they actually cared and instructed their staff to clean the mess. So the only kitchen in the home can be used during the repairs.....
By all and all after the end of this nighmare. I was waiting for the insurance payment to pay them. I was threaten by the salesman Greg . If they dont recieve the full payment within a few days . They were going to put a lien on the property..... seriously what kind of company says this. I even contact our insuance company with this and they were surprised and they have made notes for this company to not be recommended for future jobs to their customer ..... With my personal experience.  I would never recommend this company for any house hold repair.
I would of gladly have paid more to another company much better customer service and without the attitude from the sales rep.
Thank you.
I hope this help any future customers that are considering this company .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tim Czerwiec","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-wdg4xB6mwx1Dg3-ERtHYzZoIziwsWkKuomuILD1N1rJVNg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had a very disappointing experience with this roofing company. Nothing was ever completed on time as promised, and communication about delays was very poor at best. On top of that, they measured my roof incorrectly and initially quoted me the wrong price. They mentioned that they got the slope incorrect and then they increased the price, and re did my quote again- which felt unprofessional and unfair, it is not my fault that your technician cannot measure correctly.

The cleanup was just as bad as the scheduling and pricing. Debris, nails, and materials were left scattered throughout my yard, and I was left to deal with the mess myself. Overall, the lack of punctuality, inaccurate quoting, and failure to clean up made this a frustrating experience. I would not recommend this company.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Overall, we were very satisfied with our experience with Reasonable Roofing and the price that we paid was comparable to other bids we received.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wendy Zohr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIL_qg2QoqBcsG1BjMWueTvoq1sOup0Txm0W1ZKDNZTg6axKw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I had a roof emergency that had us stressed until we got in contact with Val from Reasonable Roof & Contracting. Truly after talking to her we knew we could trust her and her team with everything, she made sure to walk us through everything and answer all of our questions. Jim, the Production Manger, kept my husband in the loop of our next steps and what we could expect. Then Chad and the roofing crew took over to complete the process. I was in awe of the professionalism of everyone we talked to and their commitment and support to get this done in a timely manner for us (even with so many snow storms). Chad and his team cleaned everything up once they were done, I came home and didn’t even realize they had been there!

We have some friends that also need some roof work done in their new home and we have proudly shared Val’s contact information. We will continue to refer Val and the entire team at Reasonable Roof & Contracting to everyone we know!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"sabbb p","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwsllxyu7HihRcBfTo9zM6KW3F7JG5AkKJQpAI2aFt8n3fiQKo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"10/10 amazing company to work with, did a beautiful job. Highly recommend for anyone in the area. Very satisfied, thank you guys!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Zachary Zohr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ27XNJINx0cittaJ5HPZ9bEVyTw5hhvzR3rmI46tCA8vym4w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Recently had a leak appear in my roof during a bad winter storm and reasonable contracting saved the day! Jim the production manager kept me posted with the status of dumpster delivery and when Chad and his crew would be there to install. Chad lead an amazing crew who not only installed a beautiful new roof, but cleaned up the yard as if they were never there! [{"Name":"Chris Wright","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzbPoW44g_0tznBFKi5G9MXjG3UAlP4R46vq2x58f_CvWccw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This company was hired to deliver shingles to my property that was under renovations and destroyed our lawn.

The driver asked a worker in the house to sign off on the delivery, who had no authority to sign nor was the owner or contractor who hired Hermans.

The driver proceeded to drive on a wet lawn, get stuck and destroy the front lawn.  Hermans will not accept any liability given the paper was signed by someone.  Apparently it does not matter who signs as long as someone does.

Our cost is $450 to have it filled with soil and levelled off.  Hermans after many phone calls, has yet to return any of them.  They have wiped their hands clean of this.

I suggest all who read this hire companies who own up to their mistakes and correct them like professionals, not ignore customers who they deem unimportant.

If the costs are recuperated from Hermans I will consider removing my review.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICc9uD8EQ&fid=0x0:0xdd522b2e122d99bb"],"When":"2020-1-17"},{"Name":"Becky McEwen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQbw9yDTTvMorwo7HI6LpGGa-wmeOFFGddDjHglYcdCMLEwA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the moment I walked into the store, Derek Ellis helped me to feel at ease with the whole process of residing and roofing. title: Dupee Roofing Ltd
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Chris Jillson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFs0fPy7oZ7iiVwKXEUqFoemHPyFtewv2l5ALOvC7WgWcxGg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Had our roof done by these guys 9 years ago with a 20 yr shingles and not only does it look like crap but also leaks.  We have roofing companies dropping off marketing materials at the door on a weekly basis. After my calling for over 6 months the owner finally came out and took a look and said that there was nothing wrong but would have his worker Joe come out fix a loose shingle that he felt was causing the leak into our newly renovated kitchen.  That was a month ago and guess what ?  Joe is a no show.

Stay away from these guys unless you want to go through legal channels to get your money back which is what I intend to do.

BTW  The owner even had to balls to tell me that he didn't have to deal with me at all because it was my wife who had originally contracted to have the work done.  Real low life organization running out of a vacant  building in Campbell Street.","Images":null,"When":""}]

From the initial estimate with Steven, who was knowledgeable and not pushy, to the final inspection, the team was professional, efficient, and courteous.

The crew showed up on time every day, protected our property, and cleaned up meticulously at the end of each day. The project was completed on schedule and within the quoted price, with no surprises. The quality of the workmanship is excellent, and our new roof looks fantastic.

What really set Michigan Remodeling apart was their communication - we were kept informed at every step. We highly recommend them to anyone in need of roofing or remodeling services. A truly trustworthy company!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jane MacDonald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL97LDTYbjZTwyQUc9isBUAotISDDw_BmsHbf4iiA7KZZsicw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Michigan Remodeling completed my roof a couple weeks ago and I was very impressed. From the first visit to the last, we were very comfortable with Steve and how he operated his business.

We wanted to make a change to the roof structure and Steve worked out a plan to strip the roof where we wanted to work, make it watertight and then return to complete the roof right after the structural change was made.

Steve did everything just as he said he would do and was very responsive. The guys who did the work were busy on the job all day long with minimal breaks and no downtime. They  were very diligent in cleaning up the work area every day and were all very polite.

The price was in line with other quotes I had and even a little lower. I really wanted to work with a local company and am glad that I found Michigan Remodeling.
